title: Leandra chaetocalyx
taxonomy: Leandra chaetocalyx is classified within the family Melastomataceae. This plant is part of the order Myrtales and belongs to the family Melastomataceae. The species is native to the Americas, specifically in the tropical and subtropical regions. It is a member of the genus Leandra, which comprises approximately 70 species of flowering plants. Leandra chaetocalyx is further classified as a species of flowering plant in the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Leandra chaetocalyx is known for its potential medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
